articles.original_title: Lakers Sign Sandro Mamukelashvili To Four-Year Contract
articles.summary: The Los Angeles Lakers announced the signing of Sandro Mamukelashvili on Tuesday night, which was one day after new deals could be made official. The team did not disclose terms of the agreement, but Mamukelashvili’s Lakers contract reportedly is for $52 million over four years.
